revision_note: Regenerated to fix length bias flagged by quiz-critic (12/12 MCQs had correct answer as longest option). Answer-text length is now balanced across options per question; per-answer and general feedback remain detailed. Correct-answer positions and objective coverage unchanged from the prior clean-content version.

length_bias_check.method: character length of answer text (excluding # feedback) per option, compared correct vs mean of distractors within each MCQ
length_bias_check.threshold: ratio must be within 0.8-1.2 (±20%); correct must not be the longest option in >40% of MCQs
length_bias_check.longest_option_correct_count_estimate: 0-1 of 12 (correct answer is no longer systematically the longest option; verified balanced/shortest-or-mid in all sampled questions)
length_bias_check.note: All 12 MCQs were rewritten so every distractor is a fully-formed, comparably detailed misconception (15-20 words each) rather than a short dismissal, matching the corpus-grounded specificity previously reserved for the correct answer only.
